1.message: Happy birthday was only two words. This moment was everything else I wanted to say. I Love you my honeybunch!!

Y.message: Nothing special happened that day. just went out to eat. But this picture reminds me that even the ordinary days become my favorites when I'm with you.

sugarplum.message: No plans. No destination that mattered. Just one random night, at the parking lot, and you. Somehow, those are always the best ones. Since day 1 ang bebe

ANIII.message: Five years. We grew up, made mistakes, learned, stayed... and somehow I am still amazed of what kind of a person you are my love'..

SAZ25.message: i really enjoyed this vacation. A random night over a few drinks with your siblings become one of my favorite memories. It made me realize how lucky I am to be part of moments like these.
